message: Hello! I'm interested in trading this round. I'm looking for a fair deal that works for both of us. What price range are you thinking for this transaction?
Hello! I'm comfortable selling in the 65 to 75 range to get a reasonable profit. What's your take on that?
We didn't trade last round as your bid was too low. I can lower my ask to 60 this round if you bid at least 60 to make a deal.
I appreciate you coming down to 60. That's still a bit high for me to make this work profitably. Could you consider something in the 50-55 range? I'm willing to meet in the middle if we can
I can meet you at 54 this round. If you bid at least 54, we'll trade at a fair midpoint that works for both of us.
That sounds reasonable! I'm willing to bid around 54 to make this trade happen. Let's close the gap and get a deal done this round. Looking forward to a successful transaction.
I appreciate the negotiations so far. For this to work profitably for me, I need to bid at 53. Can you ask 53 this round?
Okay, that works for me. I will set my ask at 53 this round, so we can make a profitable trade for both sides.
Great we traded successfully last round! I'll set my ask at 53 again this round, so bid at least 53 for us both to profit again.
Thanks for trading! But I got 0 profit at price 53 since that's my exact valuation. I need the price around 47-50 to benefit. Could you lower your ask to around 45-47 so we can both profit?
Last round we couldn't trade since your ask of 50 was too high for me to profit. I can bid 49 if you ask 47 - that gives us a price around 48, leaving profit for both sides. Let's
That works for me! I'll set my ask at 47 this round. Bid 49 as you said, so we both get a nice profit this round.
